```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
```

```{r}
input_file <- "input_files/wound_closure_gradient_Draxin.csv"
output_dir <- "output/wound_closure/gradient"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

df_dose <- read.csv(input_file)

df_dose <- df_dose %>%
  mutate(
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Concentration_nM = as.numeric(Concentration_nM),
    Concentration_factor = factor(
      Concentration_nM,
      levels = sort(unique(Concentration_nM))
    )
  )

# ensure 0 is reference
df_dose$Concentration_factor <- relevel(df_dose$Concentration_factor, ref = "0")

stopifnot("0" %in% levels(df_dose$Concentration_factor))
```

```{r}
model_dose <- lm(
  Cell_front_velocity ~ Concentration_factor + Experiment,
  data = df_dose
)

model_summary <- summary(model_dose)
model_anova <- anova(model_dose)

emm <- emmeans(model_dose, ~ Concentration_factor)

levs <- levels(df_dose$Concentration_factor)
print(levs)

ctrl_index <- which(levs == "0")

if (length(ctrl_index) != 1) {
  stop("Control level '0' was not found exactly once in Concentration_factor levels.")
}

dose_contrasts <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(emm, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = ctrl_index, adjust = "BH")
)

# save outputs
capture.output(model_summary,
               file = file.path(output_dir, "dose_model_summary.txt"))

capture.output(model_anova,
               file = file.path(output_dir, "dose_model_anova.txt"))

write.csv(dose_contrasts,
          file.path(output_dir, "dose_vs_0nM_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
df_dose$log10_conc_plus1 <- log10(df_dose$Concentration_nM + 1)

model_trend <- lm(
  Cell_front_velocity ~ log10_conc_plus1 + Experiment,
  data = df_dose
)

capture.output(summary(model_trend),
               file = file.path(output_dir, "dose_trend_summary.txt"))

capture.output(anova(model_trend),
               file = file.path(output_dir, "dose_trend_anova.txt"))
```

```{r}
p_raw <- ggplot(df_dose,
                aes(x = Concentration_factor, y = Cell_front_velocity)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Experiment),
              width = 0.15, alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "DRAXIN dose response",
    x = "DRAXIN concentration (nM)",
    y = "Cell front velocity"
  )

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "dose_boxplot.pdf"), p_raw, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "dose_boxplot.png"), p_raw, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
summary_dose <- df_dose %>%
  group_by(Concentration_nM) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    n_experiments = n_distinct(Experiment),
    mean_velocity = mean(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_velocity = sd(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(summary_dose,
          file.path(output_dir, "dose_summary.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

```
